# Riff Quest (Ćwiczymy Razem)

> A comprehensive guitar exercise tracker and community platform designed to help musicians build consistent practice habits, track progress, and compete in a gamified environment. Riff Quest is 100% free — no subscriptions and no paywalls — and is funded entirely by the community through Buy Me a Coffee.

## Key Features

- **Practice Tracking**: Log your guitar practice sessions with dynamic metronomes and stopwatches.
- **Gamification**: Earn XP, level up, and unlock achievements as you practice.
- **Leaderboards**: Compare your progress with the community and stay motivated.
- **Activity Calendar**: Visual GitHub-style representation of your practice consistency.
- **Songs & Exercises**: Access a library of songs and exercises to work on, with community-rated difficulty.
- **Practice Plans**: Follow ready-made training plans or build your own structured routine.
- **Personalized Stats**: Detailed breakdown of your practice history across different categories.

## Main Content

- [Home](https://riff.quest/) - The landing page and entry point to the platform.
- [How It Works](https://riff.quest/how-it-works) - A step-by-step overview of how to get started with Riff Quest.
- [Beginner Guitar Exercises](https://riff.quest/beginner-guitar-exercises) - Free beginner drills with interactive tabs and a 15-minute starter routine.
- [Guitar Speed & Hand Synchronization Exercises](https://riff.quest/guitar-speed-hand-synchronization-exercises) - 15 spider, chromatic, legato and string-skipping drills with tabs.
- [Guitar Scale Practice Routine](https://riff.quest/guitar-scale-practice-routine) - How to practice scales, pentatonic drills, and a 15-minute CAGED fretboard plan.
- [Intermediate Guitar Practice Routine](https://riff.quest/intermediate-guitar-practice-routine) - A structured 45-minute plan with advanced technique rotation.
- [Daily Guitar Practice Plan](https://riff.quest/daily-guitar-practice-plan) - Ready-made 15/30/60-minute daily routines and consistency systems.
- [Song Library](https://riff.quest/song-library) - Community song library with difficulty ratings rated by real guitarists.
- [Blog](https://riff.quest/blog) - Knowledge hub for guitarists, featuring technique tips and practice psychology.
- [Practice Habits](https://riff.quest/blog/practice-habits) - Comprehensive guide on building effective guitar practice habits.
- [Guitar Practice Routine](https://riff.quest/blog/guitar-practice-routine) - Expert advice on structuring your daily practice routine.
- [Guitar Practice Tracker](https://riff.quest/blog/guitar-practice-tracker) - Detailed information on how to use the Riff Quest tracking features.
- [FAQ](https://riff.quest/faq) - Answers to common questions about the platform.
- [About](https://riff.quest/about) - Learn about the mission and vision behind Riff Quest.
- [Privacy Policy](https://riff.quest/privacy-policy) - Information on how we handle and protect your data.

## Pricing

- Riff Quest is **free forever**. There are no premium tiers, subscriptions, or paywalls.
- The project is sustained voluntarily by the community via [Buy Me a Coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/riffquest).

## Technical Details

- **Responsive Design**: Fully optimized for mobile and desktop devices.
